mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, merchant_id, merchant_name, subtotal, discount, delivery_fee, total_amount, status, note, pay_method, address_snapshot, pay_time, create_time, update_time

o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id, o.merchant_id, o.merchant_name, o.subtotal, o.discount, o.delivery_fee, o.total_amount, o.status, o.note, o.pay_method, o.address_snapshot, o.pay_time, o.create_time, o.update_time, u.username AS username, m.logo AS merchant_logo
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, merchant_id, merchant_name, subtotal, discount, delivery_fee, total_amount, status, note, pay_method, address_snapshot) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{merchantName}, #{subtotal}, #{discount}, #{deliveryFee}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{note}, #{payMethod}, #{addressSnapshot})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM orders o LEFT JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN merchant m ON o.merchant_id = m.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM orders o LEFT JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN merchant m ON o.merchant_id = m.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.status = #{status} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET note = #{note} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, pay_method = #{payMethod}, pay_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
